title: Fall Semester Fee Payment Deadline
content: All students must clear their tuition and hostel fees for the upcoming Fall Semester by August 15, 2026. A late fee of $100 will apply after this date. Installment requests must be submitted to the accounts office by July 31.

title: Supplementary/Re-evaluation Results Out
content: Results for the Spring 2026 Supplementary examinations and paper re-evaluations have been declared. Grade sheets can be downloaded from the academic portal.

title: Summer Maintenance Closure of Main Gymnasium
content: The Main Gymnasium will remain closed for annual flooring maintenance and equipment servicing from June 20 to June 28, 2026. The indoor swimming pool will remain open during regular hours.

title: Holiday Announcement: Independence Day
content: The institute will remain closed on Monday, July 6, 2026, in observance of Independence Day. No classes will run. Library study rooms will be open.

title: Hostel Room Allotment for Third-Year Students
content: Room allotment list for Hostels 3 & 4 has been published. Selected students must complete room registration and security verification at the Warden's office before June 25.
